description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the yshui/dmd Docker image with two stages: test and deploy. Add a tests job in the test stage that runs dub test --coverage and then uploads the coverage report via bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash). Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs dub build -b=ddox, moves the generated docs directory to a public folder, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No caches, services, or branch/tag rules are defined.
